markdown:
[Skip to content](https://innerpeace.vision/interview-form/#main)

Workforce Candidate

# SCREENING QUESTIONAIRRE

This series of questions is designed to assess your suitability to work in the In-Home & Community Support Services Sector. It starts with a focus on your qualities, then gradually reflects on your past experiences, strengths, and the lessons you’ve learned. We ask some questions regarding your physical capacity to perform the role to better understand how to support your health & safety ensuring our compliance with the relevant quality & safety guidelines that govern our work. It concludes by exploring what you’re seeking in your next role at Inner Peace, to ensure your aspirations align with our organisation’s values and mission.

First name

Last name

Email

Number

Address Line 1

Suburb

State / Territory

New South WalesVictoriaQueenslandWestern AustraliaSouth AustraliaTasmaniaAustralia Capital TerritoryNorthern Territory

Postal Code

Job role applying for

1\. Can you tell me about your key qualities and characteristics?

2\. What do you consider your greatest strengths, and what areas are you working to improve?

3\. Could you share what initially inspired you to pursue a career in this sector, and what continues to motivate you in your work?

4\. Can you provide an overview of your previous role, including your key responsibilities?

5\. Can you explain your reasons for leaving your previous position?

6\. What were some of your major accomplishments in your previous position?

7\. In which areas do you feel you excelled the most in your last role?

8\. What aspects of your last job did you enjoy the most?

9\. Were there any challenges or aspects of your last job that you found less enjoyable?

10\. Can you describe a significant challenge you’ve encountered at work and how you managed it?

11\. Can you share an instance where you encountered failure? How did you handle it, and what did you learn from the experience?

12\. Can you share an instance where you received constructive criticism? How did you feel about it, and what actions did you take in response?

13\. Can you give an example of a significant decision you’ve made in your professional life?

14\. What important lessons have you learned throughout your career, and how did you learn them?

15\. How would you describe your working relationship with your immediate supervisor in your previous job?

16\. What key factors do you consider important for your job satisfaction and work-life balance?

17\. Are there any medical conditions or past injuries that might limit your ability to perform certain tasks in this role? Please describe:

18\. Do you currently have any physical limitations or restrictions due to past injuries? Please describe:

19\. Are you able to perform the essential functions of this job, with or without reasonable accommodations? If required, please describe:

20\. What do you seek in your next career opportunity?

Send

Thank you for your time in completing this screening questionnaire. This structured sequence of questions provides us with a comprehensive understanding of your abilities, experiences, and aspirations.

If your application is successful, we will contact you within 5 business days to discuss the next steps.

[Scroll to the top of the page](https://innerpeace.vision/interview-form/#)
